messages.content: You are a practical troubleshooting assistant.
My Android app crashes after startup.
Start by checking logcat for the first fatal exception, then verify recent changes around app startup and initialization order.

2.content: Give me a quick deployment checklist.
Verify build variant, run tests, validate API keys, review release notes, and confirm rollback plan.

savedSystemPrompts.name: Concise Assistant
savedSystemPrompts.content: Answer clearly and briefly while keeping technical accuracy.
